meaning: n.德意志帝国国会,德意志(魏玛)共和国国民议会,德国国会大厦
examples: At midnight, the German flag will be raised over the Reichstag.
The building, however, retained its original name of Reichstag.
I am convinced, "concluded Goring," that a number of people fired the Reichstag.
Christo, the artist famous for wrapping the Reichstag in white fabric, plans to build it.
After the final vote in the Bundestag chamber of the Reichstag building, Mrs Merkel expressed confidence in her candidate.
